items.caption: A scene of traffic congestion on a road with a narrow underpass. the underpass is labeled "underpass" in bold, black letters. there are three vehicles visible in the image: a white car, a black suv, and a white van. the vehicles are stopped in a line, indicating a traffic jam. the road is flanked by a yellow and black striped barrier on the right side, and there is a concrete wall on the left side. the sky is overcast, suggesting it might be a cloudy day. the image also contains the text "the authority will have to widen these narrow underpasses because motorists face perennial traffic congestion while crossing to the other side." this text suggests that the image is related to a news article discussing the need to expand underpasses due to traffic issues.
a boy is skateboarding in a mesh underpass.
an historic photo shows boys standing near an underpass.
a yellow bus going under an underpass
